title: MCA Reborn Bar less Prisons
description: Takes away the 'iron-bars' needed for prisons in the MCA reborn mod.
body:
_Having compatibility issues with Minecraft Comes Alive reborn?_ 
This data pack takes away the need for iron bars in prison buildings. Use alternative blocks to your hearts content! The building now only needs an iron door and a bed. 

Original Mod can be found here:
[https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-comes-alive-reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-comes-alive-reborn)
